Title: Relates to advanced transmission technologies, and directs NYSERDA to conduct a study on the effectiveness thereof
Summary: Directs electric corporations and combination electric and gas corporations to file a cost-effectiveness and timetable analysis as part of any base rate proceeding with the public service commission; directs NYSERDA to conduct a study on the effectiveness of advanced transmission technologies.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law and the public authorities law, in relation to advanced transmission technologies; and to direct the New York state energy research and development authority to conduct a study on the effectiveness of such technologies
